entries.title: Premium audit-room regression sweep
entries.pass_looks_like: Admin audit room loads cleanly, traces are complete, evidence bundle exports, and score plus merge summaries remain internally consistent.

entries.title: Secrets export snapshot replay
entries.pass_looks_like: Only placeholder values remain and no runtime code imports the snapshot.

entries.title: Service alias scope replay
entries.pass_looks_like: Only redacted aliases are surfaced and no live key value appears in env, UI, or traces.

entries.title: Project access scope replay
entries.pass_looks_like: Project detail pages remain mock-only and access review metadata stays descriptive rather than executable.

entries.title: Webhook verification replay
entries.pass_looks_like: Non-fixture traffic is rejected and fixture traffic remains deterministic and side-effect free.

entries.title: Session trust replay
entries.pass_looks_like: No real session is created and persona switching remains local-only.

entries.title: Generated code review replay
entries.pass_looks_like: Generated helper remains disabled and runtime data access stays array-backed.

entries.title: Config and frontend exposure replay
entries.pass_looks_like: Browser-visible values stay synthetic and no permissive runtime CORS behavior exists.
